check_debug_imap: Detailed IMAP debug, without showing the password
check_deep_pec_preview: Deep PEC preview: show the real sender by reading daticert.xml/postacert.eml
check_deleted_at_end: At the end, ask for confirmation before setting \Deleted on saved messages
check_expunge: After \Deleted also run EXPUNGE (permanent server-side deletion)
check_save_password: save password locally (obfuscated, not strongly encrypted)
debug_abort_socket: IMAP abort requested: closing the underlying socket…
debug_logout_without_close: Closing IMAP connection with LOGOUT, without implicit CLOSE…
delete_confirm_expunge_warning: WARNING: EXPUNGE will also be run.
error_index_update_after_delete_failed: IMAP deletion ok, but index update failed: {error}
error_no_folder_selected: No IMAP folder selected: press ‘Test / list folders’ and tick at least one real folder.
help_load_folders: Use “Test / list folders” to load the real server folder names, then tick the folders to save.
log_backup_started: Backup started. .eml files are saved as complete RAW IMAP messages.
log_debug_enabled: Detailed IMAP debug enabled: password hidden.
log_deep_count: ; real PEC sender read for {count} messages
log_deep_preview_active: Deep PEC preview enabled: for PEC messages I download the RAW to read the real sender from daticert.xml/postacert.eml.
log_delete_cancelled: IMAP deletion cancelled by the user.
log_folders_loaded: Folders found and loaded in the selector:
log_layout_columns_invalid: Layout: column state is invalid and was ignored.
log_layout_geometry_invalid: Layout: saved geometry is invalid and was ignored.
log_layout_not_restored: Saved Qt layout is not restored by default; use --restore-ui-state only when needed.
log_layout_splitter_invalid: Layout: splitter state is invalid and was ignored.
log_no_delete_due_errors: Deletion will not be proposed: the backup has errors.
log_no_folders: No folder returned by the server.
log_open_source: Opening RAW source for UID {uid} in {folder}…
log_preview_done: Preview completed: {count} messages{extra}. Double-click a row to view the RAW source.
log_safe_mode_active: Safe mode active: Qt layout was not restored and software rendering was requested.
log_settings_saved: Settings saved and verified ({count} entries, including cutoff date {cutoff}).
log_settings_verify_warning: WARNING: settings save verification was not perfect for:
log_stop_worker_requested: Stop requested: interrupting as soon as the current IMAP command unblocks…
mail_source_truncated_note: Source preview truncated for GUI safety; the .eml backup remains complete.
msg_close_while_running: An IMAP operation is still running. Press Stop and wait for the cancellation to finish before closing, so we avoid the 'QThread destroyed while still running' crash.
msg_folders_loaded: Folders loaded in the selector. Tick only the folders to process.
msg_operation_running: Another operation is already running: wait for it to finish before starting another one.
operation_cancelled_long: Operation cancelled by the user. Files already saved remain local and the index is updated up to the last completed message. IMAP deletion will not be proposed.
raw_preview_truncated:
--- PREVIEW TRUNCATED ---
Full message: {full_size}. Showing only the first {shown_size} to avoid overloading the GUI.
The .eml backup remains complete RAW, attachments included.
tooltip_deep_pec_preview: When enabled, the preview downloads the RAW only for messages that look like PEC, so it can replace posta-certificata@... with the real sender/counterparty.
tooltip_true_sender_source: Sender/counterparty read from daticert.xml or postacert.eml
